name: Hero Pumps — HVAC Distributor
subject: ErP pump supplier for {company_name}
body:
Hi {contact_name},

I noticed {company_name} carries a broad HVAC range across {country}. One thing that might fit your lineup — we make circulator pumps at the factory level, EEI ≤ 0.23, TÜV certified.

Most of our European distributor partners switched from Grundfos or Wilo and cut their unit cost by 30-40%. Same specs, direct from our plant in Zhejiang.

Mind if I send you a sample quote for one of your top-selling models? That way you can compare side by side.
